title: How do i turn off emails with multiple failed logins to a team member's account?
excerpt:
Hi, how do I turn off the emails coming from Monday informing me that there are failed logins to a team member’s account? I don’t see the opportunity to do so in the email itself as in other autmatic emails from monday. 
…

posts.author: Spelkatros (Julian Atanassov)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, how do I turn off the emails coming from Monday informing me that there are failed logins to a team member’s account? I don’t see the opportunity to do so in the email itself as in other autmatic emails from monday.

Anyone a clue?

Thank you in advance!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Spelkatros,

I believe this is something that our support team can do for you! Would you be happy to email our support team via support@monday.com?

posts.author: IgorT (Igor)
posts.cookedHtml: Without mailing support, how can I turned this off per user?
